page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8y.2xlarge is a general-purpose instance powered by the custom arm64-based Alibaba YiTian710 processor. It features 8 dedicated physical cores running at a clock speed of 2.75 GHz, with 1 thread per core. The CPU configuration includes 64 KB of L1d cache, 1.0 MB of L2 cache, and 64 MB of L3 cache. The instance is equipped with 32.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, and operates on a KVM hypervisor with a baseline network bandwidth of 5 Gbps.

Benchmark data indicates average multi-core and single-core CPU performance, with a stress-ng multi-core score of 14486.74 and a PassMark CPU score of 6783.47. The instance exhibits strong memory performance, achieving a PassMark memory score in the top 25% and a read-only small block memory bandwidth of 818.57 GB/sec. However, cryptographic performance is a notable tradeoff, with the PassMark CPU encryption test scoring in the bottom 25% at 1308.12. Large-model LLM inference is also limited, as prompt processing for a 7B model falls into the bottom 10% at 10.72 tokens/sec, though smaller 135M model inference remains average.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the custom Arm-based architecture offers a resource-dense profile for general-purpose workloads, delivering competitive memory bandwidth per resource unit. The absence of bundled local storage and GPUs positions this instance as a cost-effective choice for stateless applications. It is well-suited for general-purpose workloads such as static web serving, Redis caching, database operations, and lightweight multi-threaded decompression tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8y.2xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 8 dedicated physical cores on the arm64 Alibaba YiTian710 processor running at 2.75 GHz. It is configured with 32.0 GB of RAM, providing 4.0 GB per core, and offers a baseline network bandwidth of 5 Gbps with no local storage or GPU accelerators. Performance benchmarks show average CPU capabilities, with a stress-ng multi-core score of 14486.74, and strong memory performance, placing in the top 25% of the PassMark memory test. A key tradeoff is its weak cryptographic performance, scoring in the bottom 25% on encryption tests. This instance is qualitatively cost-efficient for stateless, memory-reliant workloads, making it suitable for static web serving, Redis caching, database operations, and general-purpose application hosting.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8y.2xlarge is an arm64 general-purpose instance with 8 dedicated YiTian710 cores, 32 GB RAM, and 5 Gbps network bandwidth, suitable for web serving and database operations.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8y.2xlarge is an arm64 general-purpose instance featuring 8 dedicated YiTian710 cores, 32 GB RAM, and 5 Gbps baseline bandwidth.
tagline: An arm64 general-purpose instance featuring dedicated custom silicon, strong memory performance, and balanced resources for stateless web and database workloads.
bullet_points: Powered by the custom arm64 Alibaba YiTian710 processor with 8 dedicated cores.
Equipped with 32.0 GB of RAM, delivering strong memory performance in benchmarks.
Features a baseline network bandwidth of 5 Gbps with no local storage.
Shows weak performance in cryptographic encryption tests.
Best suited for static web serving, Redis caching, and general-purpose databases.
